meta.title: A Dream Chaser turned into Apollo 8 and then to Apollo 11 for some reason...
meta.description:
Surprise! I guess #scrubcember can be fun too. So we decided to just randomly play Kerbal instead! Enjoy!

Need more info? I've got it all right here! - https://everydayastronaut.com/prelaunch-preview-spacex-gps-3-01/

Check out my album "Maximum Aerodynamic Pressure" anywhere you listen to music (Spotify, iTunes, Google Play, Amazon, etc) or click here for easy links - http://everydayastronaut.com/music

Brand new shop now open! - http://shop.everydayastronaut.com

Check out my new podcast!!!! - https://ourludicrousfuture.com

Show your support and join our discord channel by becoming a Patron - http://patreon.com/everydayastronaut

Thinking about ordering a Tesla? Get free unlimited supercharging!! http://ts.la/tim19804

Already order a Model 3 and waiting for delivery? You can use my referral code too (talk to your advisor) tim19804 :)
